## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New country
- [ ] New document type for an existing country
- [ ] Algorithm correction (cite source)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated; `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm verify` passes locally (lint + typecheck + test + build + dist tests)
- [ ] Bundle size budget respected (`pnpm size`)
- [ ] Sources cited in JSDoc / docs for any algorithm change
- [ ] Test vectors are synthetic — no real document numbers committed
- [ ] Changeset added: `pnpm changeset` (skip only for non-publishable changes)
- [ ] If a new country: per-country doc added at `docs/countries/<cc>.md`
- [ ] If a new public API: documented in README

## Sources

<!-- For algorithm changes, link to the official issuer / normativa. -->

- [ ] No
